title: in carnations
body:
lyrics

i get unrooted like a dandelion puff
dissociation ain't dying i'm flying trying to find ground to touch down and lie in
so i could see what i am becoming
my end doesn't summon me
like a master that measures me
my destiny calling i see the id and let it be
busy ballin like pollen
bee buzzin i'm all in
me falling wasn't the [problem](problem)
stuck in a hole so i had to grow taller
y'all left while i leapt so i kept getting bigger
evolving to stomach the smallness i felt in my hunger
wintered above ya when wisdom went under
glistened in spring
then blistered in summer
i listen to things and ring when i'm humming
the song that i sing is something i've feeled
showered back down from up in the clouds
raining like this the flowers are crowns
seed i am scattered matted the ground
me i am shattered
never had another way out
